/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdro_hg__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libdro_hg__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/dro_hg__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dro_hg/msg/detail/motor_cmd__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dro_hg__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dro_hg/msg/detail/motor_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dro_hg__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dro_hg/msg/detail/arm_cmd__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dro_hg__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dro_hg/msg/detail/arm_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dro_hg__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dro_hg/msg/detail/leg_cmd__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dro_hg__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dro_hg/msg/detail/leg_state__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
